context: Evaluates a frontend Pinia store action that toggles the `is_pinned` flag on a note and ensures the computed `sortedNotes` property reflects the pin-first, recency-second ordering. The implementation must persist the change via the vsyncnotes Tauri IPC bridge and maintain correct sort order across all pin states.

checklist.name: togglePin implementation
checklist.description: Implements a `togglePin(id: string)` action that finds the note by ID, flips the `is_pinned` boolean, and calls the Tauri `note_update` command to persist the change.

checklist.name: sortedNotes computed
checklist.description: Defines `sortedNotes` as a Vue computed property that returns a copy of `notes` sorted by `is_pinned` descending (pinned notes first), then by `updated_at` descending as a tiebreaker.

checklist.name: Pin-first ordering
checklist.description: A note with `is_pinned: true` always appears before a note with `is_pinned: false` in `sortedNotes`, regardless of their relative `updated_at` values.

checklist.name: Store reactivity
checklist.description: After `togglePin` resolves, the `notes` reactive array is updated in place so that `sortedNotes` recomputes automatically without requiring a manual reload.
